transcript.text: North Sentinel Island is a remote island
off the coast of India and its people
have had minimal contact with the
outside world save for a few encounters
with anthropologists and Christian
missionaries fully clothed pale skinned
and speaking a foreign language these
people must seem like aliens from
another planet to the North Sentinel e
and if you're the majority of North
Sentinel natives who didn't interact
with these visitors personally you
probably wouldn't believe the ones who
did over time these contact stories
would get relegated to mythology and
lore we might be making the same wrong
assumptions when it comes to UFOs and
alien contact experiences we have our
own mythological contact stories that
half the population believes while the
other doesn't and we assume these alien
contact experiences are interactions
with beings from another planet but
maybe our so-called alien visitors
aren't from far away they're from far
ahead
